generated_oml:

]

    base:desc "Actuator for steering control"
]

]

instance ProcessedLiDARDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARDataTransmitted
]

instance ProcessedLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedLiDARDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance Visualization3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model for environmental representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and software development"
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, ACCRemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language environment"
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language environment"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

    base:desc "SQL database for data storage"

]

    base:desc "Service for real-time data monitoring including visualization, storage, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for offloading ACC computation logic to cloud infrastructure"
]

]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

    base:desc "Real-time display of projected driving path"
]

]

instance ACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Adjust ACC speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

]

instance CloudHardwareEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the cloud hardware"

]

]

]

    base:desc "User Entity running on cloud"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking), enable/disable commands, and speed modifications from the Digital Twin Entity's Controlling Functional Entity to the Physical Twin Entity's Actuation Functional Entity for motor and steering control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency of ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms between all components to meet safety-critical requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (cloud), User Entity (UI), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; components organized into Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for real-time monitoring and control, and design phase for system validation and experimentation during development."
]

    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; data serialized and translated via Data Translation Functional Entity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted on cloud infrastructure for computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT design; ISO 15622 compliance for adaptive cruise control functionality."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms to ensure safe operation; remote emergency braking capability for safety."
]
